note: Discovered Warren constants — single source of truth so agents/humans never re-query them. The API token auto-loads via scripts/wr-env.sh (never export by hand). warren-guard.js surfaces projectId+baseUrl into context at SessionStart; wr-env.sh exports them to the shell; .claude/settings.local.json pins them as env. If the Warren project is recreated, update projectId here and in settings.local.json.
